review_policy.scope: Only human-judgment decisions needed before issue #293 approval/freeze work.
selection_basis: items already marked needs_human_review by predecessor artifacts
OCR-damaged title or durable ID examples that would pollute approved joins
gate warnings about official content intentionally outside the topic tree

category_summary.grouping_note: 15 repeated section-title nodes and 64 compound or notation-heavy learning-objective nodes are grouped into policy decisions.

category_summary.note: No subject-content bullet is unmapped; the review decision is whether official non-subject-content formula/table material remains outside the topic tree.

review_items.title: Repeated section titles across P1/P2/P3
review_items.decision_prompt: Should repeated official section titles such as Trigonometry, Differentiation, Integration, Algebra, and Numerical solution of equations remain component-scoped canonical section nodes, or should they become shared concept nodes with component-specific views?
review_items.current_posture: The draft keeps every repeated title as a component-scoped node and marks the repeated-title group for human review.

recommended_options.label: Keep component-scoped section nodes
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: No node merge; issue #293 may approve the current component-specific IDs and add relationship metadata later.

recommended_options.label: Merge repeated titles into shared concepts
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 must rewrite node IDs, parent links, and question-mapping joins before approval.

recommended_options.label: Defer repeated-title groups
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 may approve unrelated nodes only; repeated-title nodes remain outside the approved baseline.

downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option determines whether #293 freezes component-scoped node IDs or rewrites repeated-topic identity.

review_items.title: Compound or notation-heavy official bullets
review_items.decision_prompt: Should compound official bullets be approved as atomic learning-objective nodes, split into child objectives before approval, or held out when OCR/notation quality is too low?
review_items.current_posture: The draft keeps each official bullet as one node and marks 64 compound or notation-heavy nodes for split review rather than inventing finer granularity.

recommended_options.label: Approve official bullets as atomic nodes
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 can approve source-faithful bullet nodes; subskills remain downstream mapping aids, not canonical syllabus nodes.

recommended_options.label: Split compound bullets before approval
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 must add human-authored child IDs and source-ref spans before approval.

recommended_options.label: Approve clean bullets and hold noisy OCR cases
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 approves only clean official-bullet nodes while OCR-damaged rows remain pending.

downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option controls whether #293 approves official bullet granularity or requires human-authored subobjective IDs first.

review_items.title: Paper 2 largely-subset-of Paper 3 boundary
review_items.decision_prompt: How should the official 'largely a subset' wording for P2/P3 be represented without overstating a one-to-one objective mapping?
review_items.current_posture: Boundary annotation is separate from the canonical tree and marked needs_human_review.

source_refs.locator:
Paper 2: Pure Mathematics 2 and Paper 3: Pure Mathematics 3 build on the subject content for Paper 1: Pure
Mathematics 1.
Paper 2 subject content is largely a subset of the Paper 3 subject content.

recommended_options.label: Keep as relationship overlay only
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 can preserve separate P2/P3 node IDs and record a non-exhaustive subset relationship.

recommended_options.label: Add explicit subset links for duplicated objectives
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 must include reviewed per-objective relationship edges before approval.

recommended_options.label: Block P2/P3 approval until full mapping
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 cannot freeze P2/P3 nodes until a full human subset map exists.

affected_artifacts: future route eligibility and question mapping
downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option tells #293 whether this is approval-ready as a boundary overlay or requires additional relationship rows.

review_items.title: P4/P6 unavailable combination and P6 prior-knowledge route
review_items.decision_prompt: Should the extracted P4/P6 route conflict be approved as a hard route constraint, downgraded to advisory wording, or held for route-table visual confirmation?
review_items.current_posture: Boundary annotation is marked needs_human_review because it is a cross-component route claim extracted from multi-column syllabus text.

source_refs.locator:
Please note, it is not possible to combine Paper 4 and Paper 6. This is because Paper 6 depends on prior
knowledge of the subject content for Paper 5.

recommended_options.label: Approve hard route constraint
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 may freeze the P4/P6 disallowed-combination boundary and P6 prior-knowledge dependency.

recommended_options.label: Downgrade to advisory route note
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 preserves wording but does not treat the claim as a hard eligibility constraint.

recommended_options.label: Hold for visual route-table check
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 cannot approve the route constraint without a visual confirmation artifact.

downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option directly controls whether #293 may approve a hard component-combination constraint.

review_items.title: OCR-damaged canonical titles and derived IDs
review_items.decision_prompt: How should obvious OCR-damaged titles and IDs be repaired before any approved baseline uses them as joins?
review_items.current_posture: The draft retains official-source provenance but some generated titles and slugs are not safe durable names.

recommended_options.label: Repair title and ID before approval
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 must approve corrected durable IDs, aliases from draft IDs, and exact source locators.

recommended_options.label: Repair display text but keep draft IDs
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 freezes imperfect IDs; future compatibility relies on aliases instead of corrected primary IDs.

recommended_options.label: Hold noisy rows out of baseline
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 approves only non-noisy nodes and leaves OCR-damaged rows pending.

downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option tells #293 whether to rewrite unsafe IDs before freezing any approved baseline.

review_items.title: Unmapped official bullets and non-subject-content official sections
review_items.decision_prompt: Confirm whether the current topic-tree approval may proceed with zero unmapped subject-content bullets while leaving MF19 formula/table material outside the canonical topic tree.
review_items.current_posture: The gate reports 155 mapped subject-content bullets and 0 unmapped subject-content bullets. Six official raw sections remain outside the topic-tree mapping; only MF19 requires future visual/table handling.

source_refs.locator: Notes and examples are included to clarify the subject content.

source_refs.section_ref: 5 List of formulae and statistical tables (MF19)
source_refs.locator: 5 List of formulae and statistical tables (MF19)

recommended_options.label: Proceed with zero unmapped subject-content bullets
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 can treat subject-content bullet coverage as complete while keeping MF19 outside the topic tree.

recommended_options.label: Create future MF19 formula/table queue
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 may approve topic nodes but must carry an explicit non-blocking MF19 follow-up.

recommended_options.label: Block approval until MF19 is mapped
recommended_options.resulting_contract_change: Issue #293 cannot freeze the approved baseline until formula/table rows are represented.

downstream_impact.issue_293_reuse: Selected option tells #293 whether unmapped official non-topic material blocks baseline approval.
